---
title: "Martin Petr"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/bodkan
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:contact@bodkan.net"
    - text: Mastodon
      url: https://fosstodon.org/@bodkan
    - text: Twitter
      url: https://twitter.com/fleventy5
---

I’m a computer scientist with a PhD in evolutionary genomics of ancient humans.

I build research software, teach population genetics, and mentor students at the University of Copenhagen. A big focus of my software development work is on designing interfaces to complex computational methods, intuitive for novices and experts alike.

Outside research I enjoy hiking, cycling, photography, books, and all kinds of games.

<a rel="me" href="https://fosstodon.org/@bodkan"></a>
